positive: A vibrant, stylized tropical rainforest scene rendered in a clean, symmetrical repeating pattern. The composition features detailed silhouettes of exotic elements like monstera leaves, hibiscus flowers, vibrant toucans, and intricate jungle vines. The color palette is high-contrast and highly saturated: deep emerald greens, pops of turquoise and fuchsia, contrasted against earthy browns. The style is graphic vector art meets retro tiki pop art. Lighting should be bright and diffused, creating strong, clean outlines suitable for screen printing on fabric. Centered design, suitable for a large-scale, aesthetically pleasing, all-over print.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, cropped, blur, low detail, artifact, messy, poor anatomy, ugly, noise, smudge, extra limbs, bad composition
